title: Rehydrating and Resuspending Primers in Solution
author: Hieu Nguyen

steps.title: Place dried primer into vile/tube if...
steps.instruction: Place dried primer into vile/tube if it is not already in it

steps.title: Place vile/tube with dried primer into the centrifuge
steps.instruction: Place vile/tube with dried primer into the centrifuge

steps.title: For each nmol of primer, add...
steps.instruction: For each nmol of primer, add 10 µL, of water to make the stock solution

steps.title: Take 10 µL, of stock concentration...
steps.instruction: Take 10 µL, of stock concentration and mix it with 90 µL, of buffer

steps.title: Stop the centrifuge and carefully take...
steps.instruction: Stop the centrifuge and carefully take out the vile/tube without mixing up the primer

steps.title: Store away the Stock Solution for later use
steps.instruction: Store away the Stock Solution for later use

steps.title: Record the nmol of the primer from the documentation
steps.instruction: Record the nmol of the primer from the documentation
